query:
SELECT 
  id,
  title,
  CHAR_LENGTH(content) as content_length,
  CASE 
    WHEN content LIKE '%وصف بصري%' THEN 1
    WHEN content LIKE '%سيتم إدراج%' THEN 1
    WHEN content LIKE '%يُدرج هنا%' THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END as has_visual_placeholder
FROM lessons
WHERE has_visual_placeholder = 1
ORDER BY id;
